Test name: CCRm (60 km/h)

Test Description

In the Car-to-Car Rear Moving (CCRm) scenario, subject vehicle travels forwards towards a target vehicle that is traveling at constant speed. The foremost part of the subject vehicle strikes the rearmost part of the target vehicle.

  • Regulation or protocol: UN Regulation No. 152
  • Ego speed: 60 km/h
  • Target speed: 20 km/h
  • Overlap between both vehicles: 100%
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
Home Summary Repetition 1
